creator: keith@keithf4.com
text:
Seems there was something wrong with my ruby installation. Only thing I noticed off-hand was that ruby 2.4 had been installed by the gems install was still on ruby23-gems. Not sure if that was the actual issue, but I just decided to force it to rebuild ruby and all its dependencies. That forced the gems package to update, which confuses me how the initial 2.4 install didn't do it. 

sudo portmaster -R r ruby-2.4

All is working now! Thanks for pointing me in the right direction.
